Caracal OS

First Launch Setup

1. Account
2. First Run
3. Reboot

Step 1

Choose your account details.

Keep the current account or set a new username and password before the mandatory setup runs.

Current user: Loading...

Skipping this step keeps the current account details.

Step 2

Mandatory first-run setup.

The wizard is now running ujust first-run. A terminal window opens for the existing Caracal setup flow.

Idle
Account

Optional account changes.

Mandatory first-run

Runs ujust first-run in a terminal window.

Reboot

Reboot when setup completes.

Log

Activity

Step 3

Reboot now to finish setup.

The mandatory setup completed. Reboot now so your groups, shell changes, and session limits are fully applied.

Ready

Caracal setup has finished. The reboot applies the new session state and finalizes the first-run changes.
